ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "x_minimum" REAL /* Minimum x-coordinate of the steel plate */,
  "x_maximum" REAL /* Maximum x-coordinate of the steel plate */,
  "y_minimum" REAL /* Minimum y-coordinate of the steel plate */,
  "y_maximum" REAL /* Maximum y-coordinate of the steel plate */,
  "pixels_areas" INTEGER /* Number of pixels in the area of the steel plate */,
  "x_perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the steel plate along the x-axis */,
  "y_perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the steel plate along the y-axis */,
  "sum_of_luminosity" REAL /* Total luminosity of the steel plate */,
  "minimum_of_luminosity" REAL /* Minimum luminosity recorded for the steel plate */,
  "maximum_of_luminosity" REAL /* Maximum luminosity recorded for the steel plate */,
  "length_of_conveyor" REAL /* Length of the conveyor used in production */,
  "type_of_steel_a300" INTEGER /* Flag indicating presence of Type A300 steel */,
  "type_of_steel_a400" INTEGER /* Flag indicating presence of Type A400 steel */,
  "steel_plate_thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the steel plate */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date and time of production */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production line */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who managed the production */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch identifier for grouping production records */,
  "steel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of steel used */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Status of the production */,
  "production_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the production process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_steel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("steel_type_id") REFERENCES steel_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated production record */,
  "edges_index" REAL /* Index for edge detection in the steel plate */,
  "empty_index" REAL /* Index for empty regions in the steel plate */,
  "square_index" REAL /* Index for square region detection in the steel plate */,
  "outside_x_index" REAL /* Index for outside x-dimensions in the steel plate */,
  "edges_x_index" REAL /* Index for edges along the x-axis */,
  "edges_y_index" REAL /* Index for edges along the y-axis */,
  "outside_global_index" REAL /* Index for outside global measurements */,
  "log_of_areas" REAL /* Logarithmic transformation of areas */,
  "log_x_index" REAL /* Logarithmic transformation of x-dimensions */,
  "log_y_index" REAL /* Logarithmic transformation of y-dimensions */,
  "orientation_index" REAL /* Index for orientation of the steel plate */,
  "luminosity_index" REAL /* Index for measuring luminosity */,
  "sigmoid_of_areas" REAL /* Sigmoid transformation of areas */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the quality assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the assessment */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_metrics_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated production record */,
  "pastry" INTEGER /* Count of pastry defects */,
  "z_scratch" INTEGER /* Count of scratch defects */,
  "k_scatch" INTEGER /* Count of skatched defects */,
  "stains" INTEGER /* Count of stain defects */,
  "dirtiness" INTEGER /* Count of dirtiness defects */,
  "bumps" INTEGER /* Count of bump defects */,
  "other_faults" INTEGER /* Count of other unspecified faults */,
  "defect_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the defect was recorded */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the defect */,
  "defect_status" TEXT /* Status of the defect */,
  "defect_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the defect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defects_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steel_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each steel type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the steel type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the steel type */,
  "chemical_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the steel type */,
  "physical_properties" TEXT /* Physical properties of the steel type */,
  "manufacturing_process" TEXT /* Manufacturing process used for the steel type */,
  "quality_standards" TEXT /* Quality standards for the steel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username used by the user in the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line within the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the line */,
  "line_status" TEXT /* Status of the production line */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "operator_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the operators assigned to the line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production line serviced */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated production record */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the assessment */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or findings from the assessment */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_assessments_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defect_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect statistic record */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated production record */,
  "total_defects" INTEGER /* Total number of defects recorded for this production entry */,
  "defect_rate" REAL /* Rate of defects per unit produced */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_status" TEXT /* Status of the statistic */,
  "stat_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defect_statistics_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES production_data ("production_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated quality assessment */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response to the audit findings */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the issue was resolved */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution or follow-up actions */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES quality_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "operation_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the operation performed */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the operation */,
  "operation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Quality Analyst, Production Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
